forbidden.description: You do not have permission to view the admin area. This area is restricted to system administrators.
forbidden.title: Access denied

danger.deleteError: Could not delete this group. Please try again.
danger.description: Soft-delete this group. It enters a pending-deletion state and is then permanently removed by the purge worker.
danger.descriptionPending: This group is queued for deletion. The purge worker will permanently remove it and all of its data.

dialog.body: {{name}} will be moved to a pending-deletion state. Members lose access immediately; the group and all of its data are then permanently removed asynchronously by the purge worker.
dialog.title: Delete this group?

danger.title: Danger zone

groupDetail.loadError: Could not load this group. Please try again.

members.placeholder: Member management ships in a follow-up update.

pendingBanner.body: This group is queued for deletion. The purge worker permanently removes the group and all of its data asynchronously — this can take a while. The page is read-only until then.
pendingBanner.title: Group queued for deletion

block.confirmBody: {{name}} will be signed out of all sessions and cannot sign in until unblocked. This does not delete their data.

unblock.confirmBody: {{name}} will be able to sign in again. They will need to start a new session — existing sessions are not restored.
